steps.title: Find the slope of the given line
steps.content: Rewrite in slope-intercept form: $y=7x+1/8$. So the slope of the given line is $7$.

steps.title: Identify the answer
steps.content: Perpendicular slopes are negative reciprocals, so the slope of the perpendicular line is $-1/7$. That matches choice B — B is correct.
